sections_cited: Sections 76, 77 and 78 of the Sindh Local Government Act

chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1319 of 2024 [Sandeep Kumar Maheshwari vs. Municipal Commissioner and Others} \ Before: JUSTICE ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON JUSTICE RIAZAT ALI SAHAR Petitioner Sandeep Kumar in person M/s. Abdul Rauf Arain and Shoukat Ali Rahimoon, advocate for respondent(s) Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh along with Municipal Commissioner MPK (Anis-ur-Rehman) Date of hearing & decision: 19.11.2025 ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON J.- This is a disposed of Petition. On 15.01.2025 this Constitutional Petition was disposed of on the undertaking of Municipal Commissioner, Mripurkhas that he will redress the grievance of the Petitioner within 15 days. However, due to non- compliance, the Petitioner moved MA No. 1094 of 2025; the same was also disposed of 27.8.2025 on the undertaking of Municipal Commissioner, Mirpurkhas. The compliance was again not made; hence instant MA No. 2939 of 2025 was moved. Today, also Municipal Commissioner, Mirpurkhas is present and submits that in compliance with the order dated 15.01.2025 passed by this Court, he has deputed two sweepers for sanitation in the concerned area and photographs of the area have been placed on record. The department has issued necessary directions to the Municipal Corporation Mirpurkhas for implementation of the Court’s directives including circular dated 16.10.2018 regarding development schemes and NITs, which are to be managed at the local Council level under Sections 76, 77 and 78 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013. Accordingly, the listed miscellaneous applications stand disposed of in terms of the statement made by the official respondents.

The department has issued necessary directions to the Municipal Corporation Mirpurkhas for implementation of the Court’s directives including circular dated 16.10.2018 regarding development schemes and NITs, which are to be managed at the local Council level under Sections 76, 77 and 78 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013. Accordingly, the listed miscellaneous applications stand disposed of in terms of the statement made by the official respondents. JUDGE JUDGE Karar_Hussain/PS*
